title: Data analysis report style
text: Q2 revenue reached 14.7 million dollars, a 22% increase over Q1 and a 38% jump year-over-year. North America led with 8.2 million; Europe contributed 4.5 million; APAC delivered the rest. Conversion rose to 4.1%, up from 3.6% last quarter. The trend supports our plan to expand the European sales team.

tips.text: Analytical writing packs facts tight and ends on a clear conclusion. Every figure has to be right; one wrong digit rewrites the story.
Numbers and percent signs dropped mid-sentence are where your hands switch gears. This is the real test of mixed-content speed.

tips.target: Q2 revenue reached 14.7 million dollars, a 22% increase over Q1 and a 38% jump year-over-year. North America led with 8.2 million; Europe contributed 4.5

tips.text: If 88 fights you, ease back to 80 and put the gain into accuracy. A correct figure at a calmer pace beats a fast one you have to redo.

tips.target: million; APAC delivered the rest. Conversion rose to 4.1%, up from 3.6% last quarter. The trend supports our plan to expand the European sales team.

character_tips.anna: Analytical prose at 88. Finance and consulting live in exactly this kind of sentence.
character_tips.maxim: Numbers and words in one line is strategic writing. Train the handoff between them and both go faster.
character_tips.knopych: Figures and prose together, full attention. Eyes up, hands steady through every number.
character_tips.klavochka: A clear-headed paragraph makes sense of the world. Type the figures as carefully as the words. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
